samples:
I close my eyes and see a vision
Of your face, the way you stood out in space
And I could hear your voice so clear and strong
Say "Welcome to Earth my child"


You have arrived, the time has come
To learn all that is needed to become
The one who creates this sacred land
So listen close and prepare to understand


Open wide your mind
Let yourself be amazed
By what's going on around


From what you read, from what you hear
Create images with words and actions
Feel their energy flowing through your veins
This power runs deep inside of you


Life itself is a circle of creation
There's nothing like it, so true to life
So take its meaning and hold on tight
For every moment comes a thousand more


Open wide your mind
Let yourself be amazed
By what's going on around
Open wide your mind
Let yourself be amazed
By what's going on around


Open wide your mind

It's a question of "when"
When will the end come
In your head, you hear the bell
And that's when it hits you


When you fall into this trance
Don't get up until dawn
You cannot see what's real
But all around you're falling down


On your knees, you pray for help
Take your chance and open wide
Let the light shine through


Open wide! Open wide!
Open wide! Open wide!

Pray to god, he hears us
As we speak in his name


I'm so lost inside
Cannot see what's real anymore
I've been sleeping so long
But now I see the light


Open wide! Open wide!
Open wide! Open wide!
Open wide! Open wide!
Open wide! Open wide!


On your knees, you pray for help
Take your chance and open wide
Let the light shine through


Open wide! Open wide!
Open wide! Open wide!

A single tear
Drops to the ground
Like rain it falls
Feel so cold, I freeze


Hands that create illusions
Take away all dreams
Destined to suffer this fate
The pain is real

Evil takes away all innocence
And destroys all hope for a better life


Life in hell on earth
Those who create it
Are victims of their lies

Living in a lie
This can't be true
Righteous anger grows
Until it breaks you down

Evil takes away all innocence
And destroys all hope for a better life

Evil takes away all innocence
And destroys all hope for a better life

Evil takes away all innocence
And destroys all hope for a better life

Evil takes away all innocence
And destroys all hope for a better life
Evil takes away all innocence
And destroys all hope for a better life

Evil takes away all innocence
And destroys all hope for a better life

Evil takes away all innocence
And destroys all hope for a better life

The world is ending, the sky is falling
Death will soon destroy us all
Fire and brimstone are falling from the skies


Acid rain is falling like thunder
Life is on the edge of destruction
Earthquake is rising to the surface
Crushing everything in sight




It's time for hell!


We must prepare ourselves for what is coming


Our planet Earth is dying as we speak
Living beings will soon become extinct
In time not far away you'll be among the dead
There will be no return


Acid rain is falling like thunder
Life is on the edge of destruction
Earthquake is rising to the surface
Crushing everything in sight


It's time for hell!


We must prepare ourselves for what is coming
Prepare yourselves for the end


Acid rain is falling like thunder
Life on the edge of destruction
Earthquake is rising to the surface
Crushing everything in sight


It's time for hell!


We must prepare ourselves for what is coming
Prepare yourselves for the end

The only way to learn, how to survive
In this world of ours is to prepare for the fight


It's a simple fact: you can't get out alive
So brace yourself and hold on tight




Survive - that's all we want
Don't get in our way
Survive - that's all we want
Don't get in our way


You are not alone when the bullets start flying
Your father was killed but he will always live on
So stay strong and carry on like you know his pain
When I was born my dad was dead




Live by your rules - I don't care what you say
To those who think they own us all
I say fuck you - I will never understand



Survive - that's all we want
Don't get in our way
Survive - that's all we want
Don't get in our way




Stay strong and carry on like you know his pain
When I was born my dad was dead

Destiny is a game of chances
Roll the dice and play for high stakes
Fate unknown, but you must pay attention
To what it tells you about your future


Fortune smiles at those who believe
In destiny and let fate decide
Which hand will choose your fate?
You have to watch out!
Don't waste time; prepare yourself to die


Luck runs out when you think you're safe
Nothing lasts forever in this world
Time stands still as you kneel before the altar
Of your master - The Master of Life


Fortune smiles at those who believe
In destiny and let fate decide
Which hand will choose your fate?
You have to watch out!
Don't waste time; prepare yourself to die


Fortune smiles at those who believe
In destiny and let fate decide
Which hand will choose your fate?
You have to watch out!
Don't waste time; prepare yourself to die


Fortune smiles at those who believe
In destiny and let fate decide
Which hand will choose your fate?
You have to watch out!
Don't waste time; prepare yourself to die

Enter the land of darkness
An ancient race now destroyed
Lost in time and space forever
Never to return


In the sky so clear you can see
The flames burning bright below
A giant dragon is breathing fire
It grows ever stronger with each blow

Feel the heat flowing through your veins
Fire at will, breathe and destroy
Dragon is approaching fast
Breath comes out as red hot steel
Leave a trail of death behind you


Descend from the skies
You've arrived
Dragons of doom

Descend from the skies
You've arrived
Dragons of doom

Descend from the skies
You've arrived
Dragons of doom

Descend from the skies
You've arrived
Dragons of doom

Descend from the skies
You've arrived
Dragons of doom

Descend from the skies
You've arrived
Dragons of doom

Descend from the skies
You've arrived
Dragons of doom

My father told me many stories
About his youth when he was young
Faced with poverty, hunger and sickness
He knew the value of gold
The silver from which they made coins


Those memories I'll hold close to my heart
They will last forever
Never forget where I came from
I am proud of what I did
My name is my own
And it comes straight from my soul

Born in the slums
Among the poor
Living for nothing but the struggle
To survive


In their dreams, they see a better life
A place without borders or boundaries
Where people are judged by their actions
Instead of skin colour, race or creed
That would make us all unite as one
As brothers, we will stand strong

Those memories I'll hold close to my heart
They will last forever
Never forget where I came from
I am proud of what I did
My name is my own
And it comes straight from my soul


Do you know where I come from?
From the slums of Rio de Janeiro
The land of samba and the bossa nova
Which I love so much

No matter how far you go
You will never find a reason why
Behind your twisted smile
Lies an empty shell that cannot be filled
With false pride you cover up
Your fears, the truth is right under your nose


Don't you know? I am ready now
To take on the world and make it mine
Life is short so I say now
Let's face reality and conquer time


This thing called "life" is what we create
The power is in our hands to get what we want


Destiny is just a word
If you don't believe it yet then prepare yourself
There is no way around this
Every second counts, so pay attention!

You might think that all the answers lie within
The secrets of the universe are out there waiting to be discovered
But it takes skill to understand these messages
And knowledge to apply them correctly

Don't you know? I am ready now
To take on the world and make it mine
Life is short so I say now
Let's face reality and conquer time


This thing called "life" is what we create
The power is in our hands to get what we want


Destiny is just a word
If you don't believe it yet then prepare yourself
There is no way around this
Every second counts, so pay attention!

I'm coming for you
I want to break your shell
Get inside and destroy


Feel the force of my wrath
Touch your skin with my teeth
Throw you down on your knees
And bite the flesh from your bones


Drink deep, all right through
You cannot escape me now
The end is near, I will not rest
Until you are destroyed


Break your neck
Leave you out-of-breath
Don't think it will go easy
To make you fall asleep


No mercy
In sight or sound
You should be drowning
But instead you're drowning your tears
On the cold ground


Now I have your attention
Pay close attention
To what I'm about to tell you


I come crashing down like a ton of steel
Into this world of pain and despair
I dig straight through your guts
And tear you apart


Twisting metal in their minds
Killing them with torture
They become so mad
Destroying every trace of life


Break your neck
Leave you out-of-breath
Don't think it will go easy
To make you fall asleep


Break your neck
Leave you out-of-breath
Don't think it will go easy
To make you fall asleep
